title: bean run contract (.bean/run.json)
description: Only the fields the compiler reads. Effort/verifier policy stay doc rules, not config.

verification.description: 2.0 oracle gate. mode=compat (default, == 1.x), advisory (warn only), strict (load-bearing claims must be verified or a named residual).

oracles.description: 2.0 registry of declared oracles (capability model: a claim may only gate on an oracle named here). Keep entries open-source clean — no internal identifiers in cmd/inputs.

cmd.description: argv array (shell:false), run by bean-verify; claim JSON is passed on stdin.

oracle_digest.description: Optional pin; if set, bean-check treats a verdict from a different oracle_digest as stale.

inputs.description: Explicit input file paths hashed into the verdict's inputs_hash (no glob expansion in Core).

trust.description: Normative, not enforced: dev_oracle gates; answer_key is report-only. bean-check cannot PROVE legitimacy — see the spec.
